name: dscacheutil
description: Utility for managing the Directory Service cache

subcommands.name: -h
subcommands.description: List the options for calling dscacheutil

subcommands.name: -cachedump
subcommands.description: Get an overview of the cache by default

options.description: Get an overview of the cache by default
Dump detailed information about cache entries

subcommands.name: -configuration
subcommands.description: Get the current configuration information, such as the search policy and cache parameters

subcommands.name: -statistics
subcommands.description: Get statistics from the cache, including an overview an detailed call statistics
